rag_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type annexes in valid component type scopes
Place implementation annexes in valid implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
Use case-provided thresholds and legal visible feature names in contracts
generic_rules: Maintain architectural integrity when inserting annex blocks
Validate scope placement for annex blocks
Preserve existing subcomponents and connections when adding implementation annexes
Use only visible features in component type contracts
Align helper declaration types with expression types in contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees in component type annexes
Write output dependency guarantees using visible inputs and outputs
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
